description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a fenced yard and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat roof and a modern, open-plan layout with large windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light. The front of the bungalow includes a driveway leading to a parking area, while the backyard boasts a swimming pool and a grassy lawn. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the darker fencing and roof trim. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence, offering privacy and a clear boundary from the street. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, fenced yard, driveway, and backyard pool. The design features large windows, landscaped greenery, and a light exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the backyard pool, and the wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, and sliding glass doors opening to the outdoor area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, parking area, and additional trees along the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
